textByHashes.09a06a3eef8859c9f6553f963ea560cac1101f15: deaded me! That wasn't very nice!
textByHashes.2fcfb8ac5542ab5f2cb44b4888c0788923ea2f71: What did you do that for?
textByHashes.a5845ce6bb25ee67352108f74f7267f4d4de4c18: Why do the slayer masters all pick on poor cockatrice?
textByHashes.5b9df0d58422202c9f20e86926241588c1dfcf42: Then mount one of them on your wall and let poor cockatrice rest in peace!
textByHashes.63d995adbc3498fd8f8be31938f8d587bd817a40: Another cockatrice falls victim to the dreaded mirror shield!
textByHashes.b73f101c85c85721831e77c1ec8b15a36630c0e2: I don't care! I think I looked better with a body!
textByHashes.f8df91a3bd11cb303a81c9d80a31b02074c1a03a: I will kill you with my paralyzing-type magic eyes look!
textByHashes.cc139405d65d1fa5daa5d2504893b0b821cf3b00: Dots appear in air between eyes and victim. Dot! Dot! Dotty!
textByHashes.1cde7261b2d0f9dac12b741dd5282cedde12538b: Concentrates mental power. Eyes narrow beak clenches veins on head stand out.
